Kitsunezuka Kofun | omitted = 前方後方墳-南 | map_dot_label = top }} '''Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun''' (代田山狐塚古墳) is a {{ill|Zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Iida|ja|飯田市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県|12=draft}}, Japan. The kofun is Historic Site1 as a Nagano Prefectural Historic Site. == Overview == Situated in the southern part of Nagano Prefecture in the {{ill|Shimoina region|ja|下伊那地方|12=draft}}, this kofun was constructed at the eastern edge of a middle terrace along the {{ill|Tenryū River|ja|天竜川|12=draft}}. Despite its age, the mound remains well-preserved, and a survey was conducted in 1993 (Heisei 5), though no excavation has yet taken place{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}. The mound has a {{ill|Zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|12=draft}} type, with the front section facing southHistoric Site Description Board.. Due to its location on a steep slope, the eastern side, visible from lower ground, appears taller. A surrounding moat is said to have existed on the north and west sides of the mound, but no burial burial goods have been discovered{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}. The construction period is estimated to be the early 4th century during the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft}}, making it the oldest kofun in the {{ill|Ina Valley|ja|伊那谷|12=draft}} region{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}. Unlike the later {{ill|Iida Kofun Group|ja|飯田古墳群|12=draft}} featuring {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft}} constructed under the influence of the {{ill|Yamato State|ja|ヤマト王権|12=draft}} in the late 5th century, this earlier kofun's {{ill|Zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|12=draft}} type suggests connections with forces from the {{ill|Tōkai region|ja|東海地方|12=draft}} rather than Yamato{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}. The kofun was Historic Site1 a Nagano Prefectural Historic Site in 1994 (Heisei 6). == Mound Details == The mound's area are as follows{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}: * '''Mound length:''' 42 m (Historic Site Description Board states 44.5 m) * '''Rear section width:''' 28 m * '''Neck width:''' pp.3 m * '''Front section width:''' 13 m File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, funcho.jpg|Rear section mound peak File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, kouhoubu.jpg|View from front section to rear section File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, zenpoubu.jpg|View from rear section to front section == Historic Site == === Nagano Prefectural Historic Site === * '''Historic Site''' ** Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun - Designated February 17, 1994 (Heisei 6)[http://www.82bunka.or.jp/bunkazai/detail.php?no=3893&seq=0 Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] (The Eighty-Two Historic Site Foundation).[https://www.city.iida.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/kitsuneduka.html Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] (Iida City Cultural Property Protection Intypeation Site "Bunka Iida").. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|Sources used for article composition}} * Historic Site Description Board (Nagano Prefectural Board of Education, Iida City Board of Education, 1997) * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=Masaharu Kobayashi|year=2002|chapter=Kitsunezuka Kofun > Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun|title=[[日本古墳大辞典|続 日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[Tōkyōdō Shuppan]]|isbn=4490105991|ref={{Harvid|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}}} == Related Literature == {{small|References not used for article composition}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1994|chapter=|url=http://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/9003 |title=Survey of Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun|publisher=Iida City Board of Education|isbn=|ref=}} - Link from Nara National Research Institute for Historic Site "Comprehensive Database of Archaeological Site Reports in Japan." * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2007|chapter=|url=http://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/8440 |title=Appearance and Development of Kofun in Iida|publisher=Iida City Board of Education|isbn=|ref=}} - Link from Nara National Research Institute for Historic Site "Comprehensive Database of Archaeological Site Reports in Japan." * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2007|chapter=|url=http://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/9271 |title=Appearance and Development of Kofun in Iida - Materials|publisher=Iida City Board of Education|isbn=|ref=}} - Link from Nara National Research Institute for Historic Site "Comprehensive Database of Archaeological Site Reports in Japan." == See Also == * {{ill|Iida Kofun Group|ja|飯田古墳群|12=draft}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun}} * [http://www.82bunka.or.jp/bunkazai/detail.php?no=3893&seq=0 Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] - The Eighty-Two Historic Site Foundation * [https://www.city.iida.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/kitsuneduka.html Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] - Iida City Cultural Property Protection Intypeation Site "Bunka Iida" [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun]][[Category:qq]] {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:pp to pp]] [[Category:kk]] [[Category:pp]] [[Category:Kofun in Nagano Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Iida]] [[Category:Zenpō-kōhō-fun]] [[Category:Nagano Prefectural Historic Sites]] [[Category:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun]] [[ja:代田山狐塚古墳]] {{Kofun navbar}}

This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} [[Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun]] {{Infobox ancient site|type = {{ill|zenpō-kōhō-fun|lt=zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=Zenpō-kōhō-fun|12=draft}} | name = Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (代田山狐塚古墳) | image = [[File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, funkyu.jpg|280px]]
Mound (left: rear section, right: front section) | alternate_name = | location = {{ill|Iida|ja|飯田市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県|12=draft}}, Japan | coordinates = {{coordinates|35|29|34.49|N|137|50|7.58|E|region:JP-20_type:landmark}} | type = {{ill|Zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|12=draft}} | area = Mound length: 42 m | built = Early 4th century | burial = Unknown | occupant = | burial goods = | Historic Site = Prefectural Historic Site (Nagano) | map = Japan Nagano | map_dot_label = Shirotayama
Kitsunezuka Kofun | omitted = 前方後方墳-南 | map_dot_label = top }} '''Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun''' (代田山狐塚古墳) is a {{ill|Zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Iida|ja|飯田市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県|12=draft}}, Japan. The kofun is Historic Site1 as a Nagano Prefectural Historic Site. == Overview == Situated in the southern part of Nagano Prefecture in the {{ill|Shimoina region|ja|下伊那地方|12=draft}}, this kofun was constructed at the eastern edge of a middle terrace along the {{ill|Tenryū River|ja|天竜川|12=draft}}. Despite its age, the mound remains well-preserved, and a survey was conducted in 1993 (Heisei 5), though no excavation has yet taken place{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}. The mound has a {{ill|Zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|12=draft}} type, with the front section facing southHistoric Site Description Board.. Due to its location on a steep slope, the eastern side, visible from lower ground, appears taller. A surrounding moat is said to have existed on the north and west sides of the mound, but no burial burial goods have been discovered{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}. The construction period is estimated to be the early 4th century during the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft}}, making it the oldest kofun in the {{ill|Ina Valley|ja|伊那谷|12=draft}} region{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}. Unlike the later {{ill|Iida Kofun Group|ja|飯田古墳群|12=draft}} featuring {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft}} constructed under the influence of the {{ill|Yamato State|ja|ヤマト王権|12=draft}} in the late 5th century, this earlier kofun's {{ill|Zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|12=draft}} type suggests connections with forces from the {{ill|Tōkai region|ja|東海地方|12=draft}} rather than Yamato{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}. The kofun was Historic Site1 a Nagano Prefectural Historic Site in 1994 (Heisei 6). == Mound Details == The mound's area are as follows{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}: * '''Mound length:''' 42 m (Historic Site Description Board states 44.5 m) * '''Rear section width:''' 28 m * '''Neck width:''' pp.3 m * '''Front section width:''' 13 m File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, funcho.jpg|Rear section mound peak File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, kouhoubu.jpg|View from front section to rear section File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, zenpoubu.jpg|View from rear section to front section == Historic Site == === Nagano Prefectural Historic Site === * '''Historic Site''' ** Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun - Designated February 17, 1994 (Heisei 6)[http://www.82bunka.or.jp/bunkazai/detail.php?no=3893&seq=0 Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] (The Eighty-Two Historic Site Foundation).[https://www.city.iida.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/kitsuneduka.html Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] (Iida City Cultural Property Protection Intypeation Site "Bunka Iida").. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|Sources used for article composition}} * Historic Site Description Board (Nagano Prefectural Board of Education, Iida City Board of Education, 1997) * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=Masaharu Kobayashi|year=2002|chapter=Kitsunezuka Kofun > Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun|title=[[日本古墳大辞典|続 日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[Tōkyōdō Shuppan]]|isbn=4490105991|ref={{Harvid|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}}} == Related Literature == {{small|References not used for article composition}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1994|chapter=|url=http://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/9003 |title=Survey of Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun|publisher=Iida City Board of Education|isbn=|ref=}} - Link from Nara National Research Institute for Historic Site "Comprehensive Database of Archaeological Site Reports in Japan." * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2007|chapter=|url=http://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/8440 |title=Appearance and Development of Kofun in Iida|publisher=Iida City Board of Education|isbn=|ref=}} - Link from Nara National Research Institute for Historic Site "Comprehensive Database of Archaeological Site Reports in Japan." * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2007|chapter=|url=http://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/9271 |title=Appearance and Development of Kofun in Iida - Materials|publisher=Iida City Board of Education|isbn=|ref=}} - Link from Nara National Research Institute for Historic Site "Comprehensive Database of Archaeological Site Reports in Japan." == See Also == * {{ill|Iida Kofun Group|ja|飯田古墳群|12=draft}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun}} * [http://www.82bunka.or.jp/bunkazai/detail.php?no=3893&seq=0 Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] - The Eighty-Two Historic Site Foundation * [https://www.city.iida.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/kitsuneduka.html Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] - Iida City Cultural Property Protection Intypeation Site "Bunka Iida" [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun]][[Category:qq]] {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:pp to pp]] [[Category:pp]] [[Category:Kofun in Nagano Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Iida]] [[Category:Zenpō-kōhō-fun]] [[Category:Nagano Prefectural Historic Sites]] [[Category:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun]] [[ja:代田山狐塚古墳]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]]

{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "Burial Facility"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} [[Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun]] {{Infobox ancient site|type = {{ill|zenpō-kōhō-fun|lt=zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=Zenpō-kōhō-fun|12=draft|12=draft}} | name = Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (代田山狐塚古墳) | image = [[File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, funkyu.jpg|280px]]
Mound (left: rear section, right: front section) | alternate_name = | location = {{ill|Iida|ja|飯田市|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県|12=draft|12=draft}}, Japan | coordinates = {{coordinates|35|29|34.49|N|137|50|7.58|E|region:JP-20_type:landmark}} | type = {{ill|Zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|12=draft|12=draft}} | area = Mound length: 42 m | built = Early 4th century | burial = Unknown | occupant = | burial goods = | Historic Site = Prefectural Historic Site (Nagano) | map = Japan Nagano | map_dot_label = Shirotayama
Kitsunezuka Kofun | omitted = 前方後方墳-南 | map_dot_label = top }} '''Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun''' (代田山狐塚古墳) is a {{ill|Zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|12=draft|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Iida|ja|飯田市|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県|12=draft|12=draft}}, Japan. The kofun is Historic Site1 as a Nagano Prefectural Historic Site. == Overview == Situated in the southern part of Nagano Prefecture in the {{ill|Shimoina region|ja|下伊那地方|12=draft|12=draft}}, this kofun was constructed at the eastern edge of a middle terrace along the {{ill|Tenryū River|ja|天竜川|12=draft|12=draft}}. Despite its age, the mound remains well-preserved, and a survey was conducted in 1993 (Heisei 5), though no excavation has yet taken place{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}. The mound has a {{ill|Zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|12=draft|12=draft}} type, with the front section facing southHistoric Site Description Board.. Due to its location on a steep slope, the eastern side, visible from lower ground, appears taller. A surrounding moat is said to have existed on the north and west sides of the mound, but no burial burial goods have been discovered{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}. The construction period is estimated to be the early 4th century during the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft|12=draft}}, making it the oldest kofun in the {{ill|Ina Valley|ja|伊那谷|12=draft|12=draft}} region{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}. Unlike the later {{ill|Iida Kofun Group|ja|飯田古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}} featuring {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft|12=draft}} constructed under the influence of the {{ill|Yamato State|ja|ヤマト王権|12=draft|12=draft}} in the late 5th century, this earlier kofun's {{ill|Zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|12=draft|12=draft}} type suggests connections with forces from the {{ill|Tōkai region|ja|東海地方|12=draft|12=draft}} rather than Yamato{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}. The kofun was Historic Site1 a Nagano Prefectural Historic Site in 1994 (Heisei 6). == Mound Details == The mound's area are as follows{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}: * '''Mound length:''' 42 m (Historic Site Description Board states 44.5 m) * '''Rear section width:''' 28 m * '''Neck width:''' pp.3 m * '''Front section width:''' 13 m File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, funcho.jpg|Rear section mound peak File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, kouhoubu.jpg|View from front section to rear section File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, zenpoubu.jpg|View from rear section to front section == Historic Site == === Nagano Prefectural Historic Site === * '''Historic Site''' ** Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun - Designated February 17, 1994 (Heisei 6)[http://www.82bunka.or.jp/bunkazai/detail.php?no=3893&seq=0 Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] (The Eighty-Two Historic Site Foundation).[https://www.city.iida.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/kitsuneduka.html Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] (Iida City Cultural Property Protection Intypeation Site "Bunka Iida").. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|Sources used for article composition}} * Historic Site Description Board (Nagano Prefectural Board of Education, Iida City Board of Education, 1997) * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=Masaharu Kobayashi|year=2002|chapter=Kitsunezuka Kofun > Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun|title=[[日本古墳大辞典|続 日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[Tōkyōdō Shuppan]]|isbn=4490105991|ref={{Harvid|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}}} == Related Literature == {{small|References not used for article composition}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1994|chapter=|url=http://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/9003 |title=Survey of Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun|publisher=Iida City Board of Education|isbn=|ref=}} - Link from Nara National Research Institute for Historic Site "Comprehensive Database of Archaeological Site Reports in Japan." * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2007|chapter=|url=http://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/8440 |title=Appearance and Development of Kofun in Iida|publisher=Iida City Board of Education|isbn=|ref=}} - Link from Nara National Research Institute for Historic Site "Comprehensive Database of Archaeological Site Reports in Japan." * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2007|chapter=|url=http://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/9271 |title=Appearance and Development of Kofun in Iida - Materials|publisher=Iida City Board of Education|isbn=|ref=}} - Link from Nara National Research Institute for Historic Site "Comprehensive Database of Archaeological Site Reports in Japan." == See Also == * {{ill|Iida Kofun Group|ja|飯田古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun}} * [http://www.82bunka.or.jp/bunkazai/detail.php?no=3893&seq=0 Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] - The Eighty-Two Historic Site Foundation * [https://www.city.iida.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/kitsuneduka.html Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] - Iida City Cultural Property Protection Intypeation Site "Bunka Iida" {{draft categories| }} {{Kofun navbar}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:pp to pp]] [[Category:pp]] [[Category:Kofun in Nagano Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Iida]] [[Category:Zenpō-kōhō-fun]] [[Category:Nagano Prefectural Historic Sites]] [[Category:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] }} [[sn:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun]] [[ja:代田山狐塚古墳]]

Designated February 17, 1994 (Heisei 6)[http://www.82bunka.or.jp/bunkazai/detail.php?no=3893&seq=0 Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] (The Eighty-Two Historic Site Foundation).[https://www.city.iida.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/kitsuneduka.html Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] (Iida City Cultural Property Protection Intypeation Site "Bunka Iida").. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|Sources used for article composition}} * Historic Site Description Board (Nagano Prefectural Board of Education, Iida City Board of Education, 1997) * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=Masaharu Kobayashi|year=2002|chapter=Kitsunezuka Kofun > Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun|title=[[日本古墳大辞典|続 日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[Tōkyōdō Shuppan]]|isbn=4490105991|ref={{Harvid|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}}} == Related Literature == {{small|References not used for article composition}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1994|chapter=|url=http://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/9003 |title=Survey of Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun|publisher=Iida City Board of Education|isbn=|ref=}} - Link from Nara National Research Institute for Historic Site "Comprehensive Database of Archaeological Site Reports in Japan." * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2007|chapter=|url=http://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/9271 |title=Appearance and Development of Kofun in Iida - Materials|publisher=Iida City Board of Education|isbn=|ref=}} - Link from Nara National Research Institute for Historic Site "Comprehensive Database of Archaeological Site Reports in Japan." == See Also == * {{ill|Iida Kofun Group|ja|飯田古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun}} * [http://www.82bunka.or.jp/bunkazai/detail.php?no=3893&seq=0 Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] - The Eighty-Two Historic Site Foundation * [https://www.city.iida.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/kitsuneduka.html Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] - Iida City Cultural Property Protection Intypeation Site "Bunka Iida" {{draft categories| }} {{Kofun navbar}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:pp to pp]] [[Category:pp]] [[Category:Kofun in Nagano Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Iida]] [[Category:Zenpō-kōhō-fun]] [[Category:Nagano Prefectural Historic Sites]] [[Category:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun]] [[ja:代田山狐塚古墳]]

{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "Burial Facility"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} [[Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun]] {{Infobox ancient site|type = {{ill|zenpō-kōhō-fun|lt=zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=Zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} | name = Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (代田山狐塚古墳) | image = [[File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, funkyu.jpg|280px]]
Mound (left: rear section, right: front section) | alternate_name = | location = {{ill|Iida|ja|飯田市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Japan | coordinates = {{coordinates|35|29|34.49|N|137|50|7.58|E|region:JP-20_type:landmark}} | type = {{ill|Zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} | area = Mound length: 42 m | built = Early 4th century | burial = Unknown | occupant = | burial goods = | Historic Site = Prefectural Historic Site (Nagano) | map = Japan Nagano | map_dot_label = Shirotayama
Kitsunezuka Kofun | omitted = 前方後方墳-南 | map_dot_label = top }} '''Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun''' (代田山狐塚古墳) is a {{ill|Zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} located in {{ill|Iida|ja|飯田市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Japan. The kofun is Historic Site1 as a Nagano Prefectural Historic Site. == Overview == Situated in the southern part of Nagano Prefecture in the {{ill|Shimoina region|ja|下伊那地方|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, this kofun was constructed at the eastern edge of a middle terrace along the {{ill|Tenryū River|ja|天竜川|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. Despite its age, the mound remains well-preserved, and a survey was conducted in 1993 (Heisei 5), though no excavation has yet taken place{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}. The mound has a {{ill|Zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} type, with the front section facing southHistoric Site Description Board.. Due to its location on a steep slope, the eastern side, visible from lower ground, appears taller. A surrounding moat is said to have existed on the north and west sides of the mound, but no burial burial goods have been discovered{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}. The construction period is estimated to be the early 4th century during the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, making it the oldest kofun in the {{ill|Ina Valley|ja|伊那谷|qq=draft|qq=draft}} region{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}. Unlike the later {{ill|Iida Kofun Group|ja|飯田古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft}} featuring {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} constructed under the influence of the {{ill|Yamato State|ja|ヤマト王権|qq=draft|qq=draft}} in the late 5th century, this earlier kofun's {{ill|Zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} type suggests connections with forces from the {{ill|Tōkai region|ja|東海地方|qq=draft|qq=draft}} rather than Yamato{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}. The kofun was Historic Site1 a Nagano Prefectural Historic Site in 1994 (Heisei 6). == Mound Details == The mound's area are as follows{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}: * '''Mound length:''' 42 m (Historic Site Description Board states 44.5 m) * '''Rear section width:''' 28 m * '''Neck width:''' pp.3 m * '''Front section width:''' 13 m File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, funcho.jpg|Rear section mound peak File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, kouhoubu.jpg|View from front section to rear section File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, zenpoubu.jpg|View from rear section to front section == Historic Site == === Nagano Prefectural Historic Site === * '''Historic Site''' ** Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun - Designated February 17, 1994 (Heisei 6)[http://www.82bunka.or.jp/bunkazai/detail.php?no=3893&seq=0 Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] (The Eighty-Two Historic Site Foundation).[https://www.city.iida.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/kitsuneduka.html Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] (Iida City Cultural Property Protection Intypeation Site "Bunka Iida").. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|Sources used for article composition}} * Historic Site Description Board (Nagano Prefectural Board of Education, Iida City Board of Education, 1997) * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=Masaharu Kobayashi|year=2002|chapter=Kitsunezuka Kofun > Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun|title=[[日本古墳大辞典|続 日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[Tōkyōdō Shuppan]]|isbn=4490105991|ref={{Harvid|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}}} == Related Literature == {{small|References not used for article composition}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1994|chapter=|url=http://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/9003 |title=Survey of Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun|publisher=Iida City Board of Education|isbn=|ref=}} - Link from Nara National Research Institute for Historic Site "Comprehensive Database of Archaeological Site Reports in Japan." * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2007|chapter=|url=http://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/8440 |title=Appearance and Development of Kofun in Iida|publisher=Iida City Board of Education|isbn=|ref=}} - Link from Nara National Research Institute for Historic Site "Comprehensive Database of Archaeological Site Reports in Japan." * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2007|chapter=|url=http://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/9271 |title=Appearance and Development of Kofun in Iida - Materials|publisher=Iida City Board of Education|isbn=|ref=}} - Link from Nara National Research Institute for Historic Site "Comprehensive Database of Archaeological Site Reports in Japan." == See Also == * {{ill|Iida Kofun Group|ja|飯田古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun}} * [http://www.82bunka.or.jp/bunkazai/detail.php?no=3893&seq=0 Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] - The Eighty-Two Historic Site Foundation * [https://www.city.iida.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/kitsuneduka.html Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] - Iida City Cultural Property Protection Intypeation Site "Bunka Iida" {{draft categories| }} {{Kofun navbar}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:pp to pp]] [[Category:pp]] [[Category:Kofun in Nagano Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Iida]] [[Category:Zenpō-kōhō-fun]] [[Category:Nagano Prefectural Historic Sites]] [[Category:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun]] [[ja:代田山狐塚古墳]]

revision.comment: 6 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:代田山狐塚古墳 up to rev 95137433
revision.text:
{{日本の古墳 |名称 = 代田山狐塚古墳 |画像 = [[File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, funkyu.jpg|280px]]
墳丘（左に後方部、右に前方部） |別名 = |所属 = |所在地 = [[長野県]][[飯田市]]松尾代田1403-71[https://www.city.iida.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/shitei-pref.html 県指定文化財]（飯田市ホームページ）。 |緯度度 = 35|緯度分 = 29|緯度秒 = 34.49 |経度度 =137|経度分 = 50|経度秒 = 7.58 |ISO = JP-20 |形状 = [[前方後方墳]] |規模 = 墳丘長42m |築造時期 = [[4世紀]]前半 |埋葬施設 = 不明 |被葬者 = |出土品 = |史跡 = 長野県指定史跡「代田山狐塚古墳」 |特記事項 = |地図 = Japan Nagano |ラベル = 代田山
狐塚古墳 |アイコン = 前方後方墳-南 |ラベル位置 = top }} '''代田山狐塚古墳'''（しろたやまきつねづかこふん）は、[[長野県]][[飯田市]]松尾代田にある[[古墳]]。形状は[[前方後方墳]]。長野県指定史跡に指定されている。 == 概要 == 長野県南部の[[南信州地域|下伊那地方]]において、[[天竜川]]右岸の中位段丘の東端部に築造された古墳である{{Sfn|代田山狐塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。現在までに墳丘を良好に残し、[[1993年]]（[[平成]]5年）に測量調査が実施されているが、発掘調査は実施されていない{{Sfn|代田山狐塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。 墳形は前方後方形で、前方部を南方向に向ける史跡説明板。。急傾斜面上に位置するため、低地からの視線を受ける東側の方が高く見えるように墳丘が築造される。墳丘北側・西側には周濠が存在したとされるが、そのほかに出土品等は知られていない{{Sfn|代田山狐塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。 築造時期は、[[古墳時代]]前期の[[4世紀]]前半頃と推定され、伊那谷では最古の古墳に位置づけられる{{Sfn|代田山狐塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。飯田地域では[[5世紀]]後半以後に[[ヤマト王権]]の影響下で[[前方後円墳]]を主とする[[飯田古墳群]]が営造されるが、その前段階である本古墳では前方後方墳が採用される点で性格を異にしており、特に東海地方勢力とのつながりを示唆する点で注目される{{Sfn|代田山狐塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。 古墳域は[[1994年]]（平成6年）に長野県指定史跡に指定されている。 == 墳丘 == 墳丘の規模は次の通り{{Sfn|代田山狐塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。 * 墳丘長：42メートル（史跡説明板では44.5メートル） * 後方部 ** 幅：28メートル * くびれ部 ** 幅：11.3メートル * 前方部 ** 幅：13メートル File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, funcho.jpg|後方部墳頂 File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, kouhoubu.jpg|前方部から後方部を望む File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, zenpoubu.jpg|後方部から前方部を望む == 文化財 == === 長野県指定文化財 === * 史跡 ** 代田山狐塚古墳 - 1994年（平成6年）2月17日指定[http://www.82bunka.or.jp/bunkazai/detail.php?no=3893&seq=0 代田山狐塚古墳]（公益財団法人 八十二文化財団）。[https://www.city.iida.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/kitsuneduka.html 代田山狐塚古墳]（飯田市文化財保護情報サイト「文化財保護いいだ」）。。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} == 参考文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用した文献）}} * 史跡説明板（長野県教育委員会・飯田市教育委員会、1997年設置） * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=小林正春|year=2002|chapter=狐塚古墳 > 代田山狐塚古墳|title=[[日本古墳大辞典|続 日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[東京堂出版]]|isbn=4490105991|ref={{Harvid|代田山狐塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}}} == 関連文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用していない関連文献）}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1994|chapter=|url=http://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/9003 |title=代田山狐塚古墳の測量調査|publisher=飯田市教育委員会|isbn=|ref=}} - リンクは奈良文化財研究所「全国遺跡報告総覧」。 * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2007|chapter=|url=http://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/8440 |title=飯田における古墳の出現と展開|publisher=飯田市教育委員会|isbn=|ref=}} - リンクは奈良文化財研究所「全国遺跡報告総覧」。 * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2007|chapter=|url=http://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/9271 |title=飯田における古墳の出現と展開 -資料編-|publisher=飯田市教育委員会|isbn=|ref=}} - リンクは奈良文化財研究所「全国遺跡報告総覧」。 == 関連項目 == * [[飯田古墳群]] == 外部リンク == {{Commonscat|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun}} * [http://www.82bunka.or.jp/bunkazai/detail.php?no=3893&seq=0 代田山狐塚古墳] - 公益財団法人 八十二文化財団 * [https://www.city.iida.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/kitsuneduka.html 代田山狐塚古墳] - 飯田市文化財保護情報サイト「文化財保護いいだ」 {{DEFAULTSORT:しろたやまきつねつかこふん}} [[Category:長野県の古墳]] [[Category:飯田市の歴史]] [[Category:前方後方墳]] [[Category:長野県指定史跡]]

墳丘（左に後方部、右に前方部） |別名 = |所属 = |所在地 = [[長野県]][[飯田市]]松尾代田1403-71[https://www.city.iida.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/shitei-pref.html 県指定文化財]（飯田市ホームページ）。 |緯度度 = 35|緯度分 = 29|緯度秒 = 34.49 |経度度 =137|経度分 = 50|経度秒 = 7.58 |ISO = JP-20 |形状 = [[前方後方墳]] |規模 = 墳丘長42m |築造時期 = [[4世紀]]前半 |埋葬施設 = 不明 |被葬者 = |出土品 = |史跡 = 長野県指定史跡「代田山狐塚古墳」 |特記事項 = |地図 = Japan Nagano |ラベル = 代田山
狐塚古墳 |アイコン = 前方後方墳-南 |ラベル位置 = top }} '''代田山狐塚古墳'''（しろたやまきつねづかこふん）は、[[長野県]][[飯田市]]松尾代田にある[[古墳]]。形状は[[前方後方墳]]。長野県指定史跡に指定されている。 == 概要 == 長野県南部の[[南信州地域|下伊那地方]]において、[[天竜川]]右岸の中位段丘の東端部に築造された古墳である{{Sfn|代田山狐塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。現在までに墳丘を良好に残し、[[1993年]]（[[平成]]5年）に測量調査が実施されているが、発掘調査は実施されていない{{Sfn|代田山狐塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。 墳形は前方後方形で、前方部を南方向に向ける史跡説明板。。急傾斜面上に位置するため、低地からの視線を受ける東側の方が高く見えるように墳丘が築造される。墳丘北側・西側には周濠が存在したとされるが、そのほかに出土品等は知られていない{{Sfn|代田山狐塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。 築造時期は、[[古墳時代]]前期の[[4世紀]]前半頃と推定され、伊那谷では最古の古墳に位置づけられる{{Sfn|代田山狐塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。飯田地域では[[5世紀]]後半以後に[[ヤマト王権]]の影響下で[[前方後円墳]]を主とする[[飯田古墳群]]が営造されるが、その前段階である本古墳では前方後方墳が採用される点で性格を異にしており、特に東海地方勢力とのつながりを示唆する点で注目される{{Sfn|代田山狐塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。 古墳域は[[1994年]]（平成6年）に長野県指定史跡に指定されている。 == 墳丘 == 墳丘の規模は次の通り{{Sfn|代田山狐塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}。 * 墳丘長：42メートル（史跡説明板では44.5メートル） * 後方部 ** 幅：28メートル * くびれ部 ** 幅：11.3メートル * 前方部 ** 幅：13メートル File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, funcho.jpg|後方部墳頂 File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, kouhoubu.jpg|前方部から後方部を望む File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, zenpoubu.jpg|後方部から前方部を望む == 文化財 == === 長野県指定文化財 === * 史跡 ** 代田山狐塚古墳 - 1994年（平成6年）2月17日指定[http://www.82bunka.or.jp/bunkazai/detail.php?no=3893&seq=0 代田山狐塚古墳]（公益財団法人 八十二文化財団）。[https://www.city.iida.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/kitsuneduka.html 代田山狐塚古墳]（飯田市文化財保護情報サイト「文化財保護いいだ」）。。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} == 参考文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用した文献）}} * 史跡説明板（長野県教育委員会・飯田市教育委員会、1997年設置） * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=小林正春|year=2002|chapter=狐塚古墳 > 代田山狐塚古墳|title=[[日本古墳大辞典|続 日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[東京堂出版]]|isbn=4490105991|ref={{Harvid|代田山狐塚古墳（続古墳）|2002}}}} == 関連文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用していない関連文献）}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1994|chapter=|url=http://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/9003 |title=代田山狐塚古墳の測量調査|publisher=飯田市教育委員会|isbn=|ref=}} - リンクは奈良文化財研究所「全国遺跡報告総覧」。 * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2007|chapter=|url=http://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/8440 |title=飯田における古墳の出現と展開|publisher=飯田市教育委員会|isbn=|ref=}} - リンクは奈良文化財研究所「全国遺跡報告総覧」。 * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2007|chapter=|url=http://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/9271 |title=飯田における古墳の出現と展開 -資料編-|publisher=飯田市教育委員会|isbn=|ref=}} - リンクは奈良文化財研究所「全国遺跡報告総覧」。 == 関連項目 == * [[飯田古墳群]] == 外部リンク == {{Commonscat|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun}} * [http://www.82bunka.or.jp/bunkazai/detail.php?no=3893&seq=0 代田山狐塚古墳] - 公益財団法人 八十二文化財団 * [https://www.city.iida.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/kitsuneduka.html 代田山狐塚古墳] - 飯田市文化財保護情報サイト「文化財保護いいだ」 {{DEFAULTSORT:しろたやまきつねつかこふん}} [[Category:長野県の古墳]] [[Category:飯田市の歴史]] [[Category:前方後方墳]] [[Category:長野県指定史跡]]

{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "Burial Facility"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} [[Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun]] {{Infobox ancient site|type = {{ill|zenpō-kōhō-fun|lt=zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=Zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} | name = Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (代田山狐塚古墳) | image = [[File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, funkyu.jpg|280px]]
Mound (left: rear section, right: front section) | alternate_name = | location = {{ill|Iida|ja|飯田市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Japan | coordinates = {{coordinates|35|29|34.49|N|137|50|7.58|E|region:JP-20_type:landmark}} | type = {{ill|Zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} | area = Mound length: 42 m | built = Early 4th century | burial = Unknown | occupant = | burial goods = | Historic Site = Prefectural Historic Site (Nagano) | map = Japan Nagano | map_dot_label = Shirotayama
Kitsunezuka Kofun | omitted = 前方後方墳-南 | map_dot_label = top }} '''Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun''' (代田山狐塚古墳) is a {{ill|Zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} located in {{ill|Iida|ja|飯田市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Japan. The kofun is Historic Site1 as a Nagano Prefectural Historic Site. == Overview == Situated in the southern part of Nagano Prefecture in the {{ill|Shimoina region|ja|下伊那地方|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, this kofun was constructed at the eastern edge of a middle terrace along the {{ill|Tenryū River|ja|天竜川|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. Despite its age, the mound remains well-preserved, and a survey was conducted in 1993 (Heisei 5), though no excavation has yet taken place{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}. The mound has a {{ill|Zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} type, with the front section facing southHistoric Site Description Board.. Due to its location on a steep slope, the eastern side, visible from lower ground, appears taller. A surrounding moat is said to have existed on the north and west sides of the mound, but no burial burial goods have been discovered{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}. The construction period is estimated to be the early 4th century during the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, making it the oldest kofun in the {{ill|Ina Valley|ja|伊那谷|qq=draft|qq=draft}} region{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}. Unlike the later {{ill|Iida Kofun Group|ja|飯田古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft}} featuring {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} constructed under the influence of the {{ill|Yamato State|ja|ヤマト王権|qq=draft|qq=draft}} in the late 5th century, this earlier kofun's {{ill|Zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} type suggests connections with forces from the {{ill|Tōkai region|ja|東海地方|qq=draft|qq=draft}} rather than Yamato{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}. The kofun was Historic Site1 a Nagano Prefectural Historic Site in 1994 (Heisei 6). == Mound Details == The mound's area are as follows{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}: * '''Mound length:''' 42 m (Historic Site Description Board states 44.5 m) * '''Rear section width:''' 28 m * '''Neck width:''' pp.3 m * '''Front section width:''' 13 m File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, funcho.jpg|Rear section mound peak File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, kouhoubu.jpg|View from front section to rear section File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, zenpoubu.jpg|View from rear section to front section == Historic Site == === Nagano Prefectural Historic Site === * '''Historic Site''' ** Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun - Designated February 17, 1994 (Heisei 6)[http://www.82bunka.or.jp/bunkazai/detail.php?no=3893&seq=0 Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] (The Eighty-Two Historic Site Foundation).[https://www.city.iida.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/kitsuneduka.html Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] (Iida City Cultural Property Protection Intypeation Site "Bunka Iida").. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|Sources used for article composition}} * Historic Site Description Board (Nagano Prefectural Board of Education, Iida City Board of Education, 1997) * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=Masaharu Kobayashi|year=2002|chapter=Kitsunezuka Kofun > Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun|title=[[日本古墳大辞典|続 日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[Tōkyōdō Shuppan]]|isbn=4490105991|ref={{Harvid|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}}} == Related Literature == {{small|References not used for article composition}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1994|chapter=|url=http://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/9003 |title=Survey of Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun|publisher=Iida City Board of Education|isbn=|ref=}} - Link from Nara National Research Institute for Historic Site "Comprehensive Database of Archaeological Site Reports in Japan." * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2007|chapter=|url=http://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/8440 |title=Appearance and Development of Kofun in Iida|publisher=Iida City Board of Education|isbn=|ref=}} - Link from Nara National Research Institute for Historic Site "Comprehensive Database of Archaeological Site Reports in Japan." * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2007|chapter=|url=http://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/9271 |title=Appearance and Development of Kofun in Iida - Materials|publisher=Iida City Board of Education|isbn=|ref=}} - Link from Nara National Research Institute for Historic Site "Comprehensive Database of Archaeological Site Reports in Japan." == See Also == * {{ill|Iida Kofun Group|ja|飯田古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun}} * [http://www.82bunka.or.jp/bunkazai/detail.php?no=3893&seq=0 Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] - The Eighty-Two Historic Site Foundation * [https://www.city.iida.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/kitsuneduka.html Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] - Iida City Cultural Property Protection Intypeation Site "Bunka Iida" {{draft categories| }} {{Kofun navbar}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:pp to pp]] [[Category:pp]] [[Category:Kofun in Nagano Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Iida]] [[Category:Zenpō-kōhō-fun]] [[Category:Nagano Prefectural Historic Sites]] [[Category:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun]] [[ja:代田山狐塚古墳]] {{translated page|ja|代田山狐塚古墳|version=95137433|comment=Imported full ja history}}

Mound (left: rear section, right: front section) | alternate_name = | location = {{ill|Iida|ja|飯田市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Japan | coordinates = {{coordinates|35|29|34.49|N|137|50|7.58|E|region:JP-20_type:landmark}} | type = {{ill|Zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} | area = Mound length: 42 m | built = Early 4th century | burial = Unknown | occupant = | burial goods = | Historic Site = Prefectural Historic Site (Nagano) | map = Japan Nagano | map_dot_label = Shirotayama
Kitsunezuka Kofun | omitted = 前方後方墳-南 | map_dot_label = top }} '''Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun''' (代田山狐塚古墳) is a {{ill|Zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} located in {{ill|Iida|ja|飯田市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Japan. The kofun is Historic Site1 as a Nagano Prefectural Historic Site. == Overview == Situated in the southern part of Nagano Prefecture in the {{ill|Shimoina region|ja|下伊那地方|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, this kofun was constructed at the eastern edge of a middle terrace along the {{ill|Tenryū River|ja|天竜川|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. Despite its age, the mound remains well-preserved, and a survey was conducted in 1993 (Heisei 5), though no excavation has yet taken place{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}. The mound has a {{ill|Zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} type, with the front section facing southHistoric Site Description Board.. Due to its location on a steep slope, the eastern side, visible from lower ground, appears taller. A surrounding moat is said to have existed on the north and west sides of the mound, but no burial burial goods have been discovered{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}. The construction period is estimated to be the early 4th century during the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, making it the oldest kofun in the {{ill|Ina Valley|ja|伊那谷|qq=draft|qq=draft}} region{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}. Unlike the later {{ill|Iida Kofun Group|ja|飯田古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft}} featuring {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} constructed under the influence of the {{ill|Yamato State|ja|ヤマト王権|qq=draft|qq=draft}} in the late 5th century, this earlier kofun's {{ill|Zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} type suggests connections with forces from the {{ill|Tōkai region|ja|東海地方|qq=draft|qq=draft}} rather than Yamato{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}. The kofun was Historic Site1 a Nagano Prefectural Historic Site in 1994 (Heisei 6). == Mound Details == The mound's area are as follows{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}: * '''Mound length:''' 42 m (Historic Site Description Board states 44.5 m) * '''Rear section width:''' 28 m * '''Neck width:''' pp.3 m * '''Front section width:''' 13 m File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, funcho.jpg|Rear section mound peak File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, kouhoubu.jpg|View from front section to rear section File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, zenpoubu.jpg|View from rear section to front section == Historic Site == === Nagano Prefectural Historic Site === * '''Historic Site''' ** Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun - Designated February 17, 1994 (Heisei 6)[http://www.82bunka.or.jp/bunkazai/detail.php?no=3893&seq=0 Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] (The Eighty-Two Historic Site Foundation).[https://www.city.iida.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/kitsuneduka.html Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] (Iida City Cultural Property Protection Intypeation Site "Bunka Iida").. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|Sources used for article composition}} * Historic Site Description Board (Nagano Prefectural Board of Education, Iida City Board of Education, 1997) * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=Masaharu Kobayashi|year=2002|chapter=Kitsunezuka Kofun > Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun|title=[[日本古墳大辞典|続 日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[Tōkyōdō Shuppan]]|isbn=4490105991|ref={{Harvid|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}}} == Related Literature == {{small|References not used for article composition}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1994|chapter=|url=http://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/9003 |title=Survey of Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun|publisher=Iida City Board of Education|isbn=|ref=}} - Link from Nara National Research Institute for Historic Site "Comprehensive Database of Archaeological Site Reports in Japan." * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2007|chapter=|url=http://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/8440 |title=Appearance and Development of Kofun in Iida|publisher=Iida City Board of Education|isbn=|ref=}} - Link from Nara National Research Institute for Historic Site "Comprehensive Database of Archaeological Site Reports in Japan." * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2007|chapter=|url=http://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/9271 |title=Appearance and Development of Kofun in Iida - Materials|publisher=Iida City Board of Education|isbn=|ref=}} - Link from Nara National Research Institute for Historic Site "Comprehensive Database of Archaeological Site Reports in Japan." == See Also == * {{ill|Iida Kofun Group|ja|飯田古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun}} * [http://www.82bunka.or.jp/bunkazai/detail.php?no=3893&seq=0 Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] - The Eighty-Two Historic Site Foundation * [https://www.city.iida.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/kitsuneduka.html Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] - Iida City Cultural Property Protection Intypeation Site "Bunka Iida" {{draft categories| }} {{Kofun navbar}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:pp to pp]] [[Category:Kofun in Nagano Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Iida]] [[Category:Zenpō-kōhō-fun]] [[Category:Nagano Prefectural Historic Sites]] [[Category:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun]] [[ja:代田山狐塚古墳]] {{translated page|ja|代田山狐塚古墳|version=95137433|comment=Imported full ja history}}

Designated February 17, 1994 (Heisei 6)[http://www.82bunka.or.jp/bunkazai/detail.php?no=3893&seq=0 Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] (The Eighty-Two Historic Site Foundation).[https://www.city.iida.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/kitsuneduka.html Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] (Iida City Cultural Property Protection Intypeation Site "Bunka Iida").. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|Sources used for article composition}} * Historic Site Description Board (Nagano Prefectural Board of Education, Iida City Board of Education, 1997) * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=Masaharu Kobayashi|year=2002|chapter=Kitsunezuka Kofun > Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun|title=[[日本古墳大辞典|続 日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[Tōkyōdō Shuppan]]|isbn=4490105991|ref={{Harvid|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}}} == Related Literature == {{small|References not used for article composition}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1994|chapter=|url=http://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/9003 |title=Survey of Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun|publisher=Iida City Board of Education|isbn=|ref=}} - Link from Nara National Research Institute for Historic Site "Comprehensive Database of Archaeological Site Reports in Japan." * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2007|chapter=|url=http://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/8440 |title=Appearance and Development of Kofun in Iida|publisher=Iida City Board of Education|isbn=|ref=}} - Link from Nara National Research Institute for Historic Site "Comprehensive Database of Archaeological Site Reports in Japan." * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2007|chapter=|url=http://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/9271 |title=Appearance and Development of Kofun in Iida - Materials|publisher=Iida City Board of Education|isbn=|ref=}} - Link from Nara National Research Institute for Historic Site "Comprehensive Database of Archaeological Site Reports in Japan." == See Also == * {{ill|Iida Kofun Group|ja|飯田古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun}} * [http://www.82bunka.or.jp/bunkazai/detail.php?no=3893&seq=0 Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] - The Eighty-Two Historic Site Foundation * [https://www.city.iida.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/kitsuneduka.html Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] - Iida City Cultural Property Protection Intypeation Site "Bunka Iida" {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|代田山狐塚古墳|version=95137433|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:pp to pp]] [[Category:Kofun in Nagano Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Iida]] [[Category:Zenpō-kōhō-fun]] [[Category:Nagano Prefectural Historic Sites]] [[Category:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun]]}} [[sn:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun]] [[ja:代田山狐塚古墳]]

{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "Burial Facility"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} [[Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun]] {{Infobox ancient site|type = {{ill|zenpō-kōhō-fun|lt=zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=Zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} | name = Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (代田山狐塚古墳) | image = [[File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, funkyu.jpg|280px]]
Mound (left: rear section, right: front section) | alternate_name = | location = {{ill|Iida|ja|飯田市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Japan | coordinates = {{coordinates|35|29|34.49|N|137|50|7.58|E|region:JP-20_type:landmark}} | type = {{ill|Zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} | area = Mound length: 42 m | built = Early 4th century | burial = Unknown | occupant = | burial goods = | Historic Site = Prefectural Historic Site (Nagano) | map = Japan Nagano | map_dot_label = Shirotayama
Kitsunezuka Kofun | omitted = 前方後方墳-南 | map_dot_label = top }} '''Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun''' (代田山狐塚古墳) is a {{ill|Zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} located in {{ill|Iida|ja|飯田市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Japan. The kofun is Historic Site1 as a Nagano Prefectural Historic Site. == Overview == Situated in the southern part of Nagano Prefecture in the {{ill|Shimoina region|ja|下伊那地方|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, this kofun was constructed at the eastern edge of a middle terrace along the {{ill|Tenryū River|ja|天竜川|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. Despite its age, the mound remains well-preserved, and a survey was conducted in 1993 (Heisei 5), though no excavation has yet taken place{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}. The mound has a {{ill|Zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} type, with the front section facing southHistoric Site Description Board.. Due to its location on a steep slope, the eastern side, visible from lower ground, appears taller. A surrounding moat is said to have existed on the north and west sides of the mound, but no burial burial goods have been discovered{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}. The construction period is estimated to be the early 4th century during the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, making it the oldest kofun in the {{ill|Ina Valley|ja|伊那谷|qq=draft|qq=draft}} region{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}. Unlike the later {{ill|Iida Kofun Group|ja|飯田古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft}} featuring {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} constructed under the influence of the {{ill|Yamato State|ja|ヤマト王権|qq=draft|qq=draft}} in the late 5th century, this earlier kofun's {{ill|Zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} type suggests connections with forces from the {{ill|Tōkai region|ja|東海地方|qq=draft|qq=draft}} rather than Yamato{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}. The kofun was Historic Site1 a Nagano Prefectural Historic Site in 1994 (Heisei 6). == Mound Details == The mound's area are as follows{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}: * '''Mound length:''' 42 m (Historic Site Description Board states 44.5 m) * '''Rear section width:''' 28 m * '''Neck width:''' pp.3 m * '''Front section width:''' 13 m File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, funcho.jpg|Rear section mound peak File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, kouhoubu.jpg|View from front section to rear section File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, zenpoubu.jpg|View from rear section to front section == Historic Site == === Nagano Prefectural Historic Site === * '''Historic Site''' ** Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun - Designated February 17, 1994 (Heisei 6)[http://www.82bunka.or.jp/bunkazai/detail.php?no=3893&seq=0 Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] (The Eighty-Two Historic Site Foundation).[https://www.city.iida.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/kitsuneduka.html Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] (Iida City Cultural Property Protection Intypeation Site "Bunka Iida").. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|Sources used for article composition}} * Historic Site Description Board (Nagano Prefectural Board of Education, Iida City Board of Education, 1997) * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=Masaharu Kobayashi|year=2002|chapter=Kitsunezuka Kofun > Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun|title=[[日本古墳大辞典|続 日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[Tōkyōdō Shuppan]]|isbn=4490105991|ref={{Harvid|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}}} == Related Literature == {{small|References not used for article composition}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1994|chapter=|url=http://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/9003 |title=Survey of Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun|publisher=Iida City Board of Education|isbn=|ref=}} - Link from Nara National Research Institute for Historic Site "Comprehensive Database of Archaeological Site Reports in Japan." * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2007|chapter=|url=http://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/8440 |title=Appearance and Development of Kofun in Iida|publisher=Iida City Board of Education|isbn=|ref=}} - Link from Nara National Research Institute for Historic Site "Comprehensive Database of Archaeological Site Reports in Japan." * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2007|chapter=|url=http://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/9271 |title=Appearance and Development of Kofun in Iida - This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} [[Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun]] {{Infobox ancient site|type = {{ill|zenpō-kōhō-fun|lt=zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=Zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/zenpō-kōhō-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=}} | name = Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (代田山狐塚古墳) | image = [[File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, funkyu.jpg|280px]]
Mound (left: rear section, right: front section) | alternate_name = | location = {{ill|Iida|ja|飯田市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iida|qq=}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagano Prefecture|qq=}}, Japan | coordinates = {{coordinates|35|29|34.49|N|137|50|7.58|E|region:JP-20_type:landmark}} | type = {{ill|Zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpō-kōhō-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=}} | area = Mound length: 42 m | built = Early 4th century | burial = Unknown | occupant = | burial goods = | Historic Site = Prefectural Historic Site (Nagano) | map = Japan Nagano | map_dot_label = Shirotayama
Kitsunezuka Kofun | omitted = 前方後方墳-南 | map_dot_label = top }} '''Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun''' (代田山狐塚古墳) is a {{ill|Zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpō-kōhō-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=}} located in {{ill|Iida|ja|飯田市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iida|qq=}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagano Prefecture|qq=}}, Japan. The kofun is Historic Site1 as a Nagano Prefectural Historic Site. == Overview == Situated in the southern part of Nagano Prefecture in the {{ill|Shimoina region|ja|下伊那地方|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimoina region|qq=}}, this kofun was constructed at the eastern edge of a middle terrace along the {{ill|Tenryū River|ja|天竜川|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenryū River|qq=}}. Despite its age, the mound remains well-preserved, and a survey was conducted in 1993 (Heisei 5), though no excavation has yet taken place{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}. The mound has a {{ill|Zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpō-kōhō-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=}} type, with the front section facing southHistoric Site Description Board.. Due to its location on a steep slope, the eastern side, visible from lower ground, appears taller. A surrounding moat is said to have existed on the north and west sides of the mound, but no burial burial goods have been discovered{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}. The construction period is estimated to be the early 4th century during the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun period|qq=}}, making it the oldest kofun in the {{ill|Ina Valley|ja|伊那谷|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ina Valley|qq=}} region{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}. Unlike the later {{ill|Iida Kofun Group|ja|飯田古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iida Kofun Group|qq=}} featuring {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpō-kōen-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoenfun|qq=}} constructed under the influence of the {{ill|Yamato State|ja|ヤマト王権|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato State|qq=}} in the late 5th century, this earlier kofun's {{ill|Zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpō-kōhō-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=}} type suggests connections with forces from the {{ill|Tōkai region|ja|東海地方|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōkai region|qq=}} rather than Yamato{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}. The kofun was Historic Site1 a Nagano Prefectural Historic Site in 1994 (Heisei 6). == Mound Details == The mound's area are as follows{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}: * '''Mound length:''' 42 m (Historic Site Description Board states 44.5 m) * '''Rear section width:''' 28 m * '''Neck width:''' pp.3 m * '''Front section width:''' 13 m File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, funcho.jpg|Rear section mound peak File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, kouhoubu.jpg|View from front section to rear section File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, zenpoubu.jpg|View from rear section to front section == Historic Site == === Nagano Prefectural Historic Site === * '''Historic Site''' ** Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun - Designated February 17, 1994 (Heisei 6)[http://www.82bunka.or.jp/bunkazai/detail.php?no=3893&seq=0 Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] (The Eighty-Two Historic Site Foundation).[https://www.city.iida.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/kitsuneduka.html Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] (Iida City Cultural Property Protection Intypeation Site "Bunka Iida").. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|Sources used for article composition}} * Historic Site Description Board (Nagano Prefectural Board of Education, Iida City Board of Education, 1997) * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=Masaharu Kobayashi|year=2002|chapter=Kitsunezuka Kofun > Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun|title=[[日本古墳大辞典|続 日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[Tōkyōdō Shuppan]]|isbn=4490105991|ref={{Harvid|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}}} == Related Literature == {{small|References not used for article composition}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1994|chapter=|url=http://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/9003 |title=Survey of Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun|publisher=Iida City Board of Education|isbn=|ref=}} - Link from Nara National Research Institute for Historic Site "Comprehensive Database of Archaeological Site Reports in Japan." * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2007|chapter=|url=http://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/8440 |title=Appearance and Development of Kofun in Iida|publisher=Iida City Board of Education|isbn=|ref=}} - Link from Nara National Research Institute for Historic Site "Comprehensive Database of Archaeological Site Reports in Japan." * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2007|chapter=|url=http://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/9271 |title=Appearance and Development of Kofun in Iida - Materials|publisher=Iida City Board of Education|isbn=|ref=}} - Link from Nara National Research Institute for Historic Site "Comprehensive Database of Archaeological Site Reports in Japan." == See Also == * {{ill|Iida Kofun Group|ja|飯田古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iida Kofun Group|qq=}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun}} * [http://www.82bunka.or.jp/bunkazai/detail.php?no=3893&seq=0 Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] - The Eighty-Two Historic Site Foundation * [https://www.city.iida.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/kitsuneduka.html Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] - Iida City Cultural Property Protection Intypeation Site "Bunka Iida" {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|代田山狐塚古墳|version=95137433|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Nagano Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Iida]] [[Category:Zenpō-kōhō-fun]] [[Category:Nagano Prefectural Historic Sites]] [[Category:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun]]}} [[sn:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun]] [[ja:代田山狐塚古墳]]

The kofun is Historic Site1 as a Nagano Prefectural Historic Site. == Overview == Situated in the southern part of Nagano Prefecture in the {{ill|Shimoina region|ja|下伊那地方|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimoina region|qq=}}, this kofun was constructed at the eastern edge of a middle terrace along the {{ill|Tenryū River|ja|天竜川|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenryū River|qq=}}. Despite its age, the mound remains well-preserved, and a survey was conducted in 1993 (Heisei 5), though no excavation has yet taken place{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}. The mound has a {{ill|Zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|lt=Zenpō-kōhō-fun|1=Zenpō-kōhō-fun|comment=doing this because I need to differentiate it in piped links too with my new interwiki tool as not the ambiguous phrase keyhole shaped kofun|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpō-kōhō-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=}} type, with the front section facing southHistoric Site Description Board.. Due to its location on a steep slope, the eastern side, visible from lower ground, appears taller. A surrounding moat is said to have existed on the north and west sides of the mound, but no burial burial goods have been discovered{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}. The construction period is estimated to be the early 4th century during the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun period|qq=}}, making it the oldest kofun in the {{ill|Ina Valley|ja|伊那谷|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ina Valley|qq=}} region{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}. Unlike the later {{ill|Iida Kofun Group|ja|飯田古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iida Kofun Group|qq=}} featuring {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳|lt=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|comment=doing this because I need to differentiate it in piped links too with my new interwiki tool as not the ambiguous phrase keyhole shaped kofun|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpō-kōen-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoenfun|qq=}} constructed under the influence of the {{ill|Yamato State|ja|ヤマト王権|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato State|qq=}} in the late 5th century, this earlier kofun's {{ill|Zenpō-kōhō-fun|ja|前方後方墳|lt=Zenpō-kōhō-fun|1=Zenpō-kōhō-fun|comment=doing this because I need to differentiate it in piped links too with my new interwiki tool as not the ambiguous phrase keyhole shaped kofun|1=zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpō-kōhō-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/zenpō-kōhō-fun|qq=}} type suggests connections with forces from the {{ill|Tōkai region|ja|東海地方|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōkai region|qq=}} rather than Yamato{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}. The kofun was Historic Site1 a Nagano Prefectural Historic Site in 1994 (Heisei 6). == Mound Details == The mound's area are as follows{{Sfn|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}: * '''Mound length:''' 42 m (Historic Site Description Board states 44.5 m) * '''Rear section width:''' 28 m * '''Neck width:''' pp.3 m * '''Front section width:''' 13 m File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, funcho.jpg|Rear section mound peak File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, kouhoubu.jpg|View from front section to rear section File:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun, zenpoubu.jpg|View from rear section to front section == Historic Site == === Nagano Prefectural Historic Site === * '''Historic Site''' ** Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun - Designated February 17, 1994 (Heisei 6)[http://www.82bunka.or.jp/bunkazai/detail.php?no=3893&seq=0 Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] (The Eighty-Two Historic Site Foundation).[https://www.city.iida.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/kitsuneduka.html Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] (Iida City Cultural Property Protection Intypeation Site "Bunka Iida").. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|Sources used for article composition}} * Historic Site Description Board (Nagano Prefectural Board of Education, Iida City Board of Education, 1997) * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=Masaharu Kobayashi|year=2002|chapter=Kitsunezuka Kofun > Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun|title=[[日本古墳大辞典|続 日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[Tōkyōdō Shuppan]]|isbn=4490105991|ref={{Harvid|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun (Continued Ancient Mounds)|2002}}}} == Related Literature == {{small|References not used for article composition}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1994|chapter=|url=http://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/9003 |title=Survey of Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun|publisher=Iida City Board of Education|isbn=|ref=}} - Link from Nara National Research Institute for Historic Site "Comprehensive Database of Archaeological Site Reports in Japan." * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2007|chapter=|url=http://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/8440 |title=Appearance and Development of Kofun in Iida|publisher=Iida City Board of Education|isbn=|ref=}} - Link from Nara National Research Institute for Historic Site "Comprehensive Database of Archaeological Site Reports in Japan." * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2007|chapter=|url=http://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/9271 |title=Appearance and Development of Kofun in Iida - Materials|publisher=Iida City Board of Education|isbn=|ref=}} - Link from Nara National Research Institute for Historic Site "Comprehensive Database of Archaeological Site Reports in Japan." == See Also == * {{ill|Iida Kofun Group|ja|飯田古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iida Kofun Group|qq=}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun}} * [http://www.82bunka.or.jp/bunkazai/detail.php?no=3893&seq=0 Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] - The Eighty-Two Historic Site Foundation * [https://www.city.iida.lg.jp/site/bunkazai/kitsuneduka.html Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun] - Iida City Cultural Property Protection Intypeation Site "Bunka Iida" {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|代田山狐塚古墳|version=95137433|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Nagano Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Iida]] [[Category:Zenpō-kōhō-fun]] [[Category:Nagano Prefectural Historic Sites]] [[Category:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun]]}} [[sn:Shirotayama Kitsunezuka Kofun]] [[ja:代田山狐塚古墳]]
